name: Anhui Hengyuan Coal-Electricity Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Hengyuan Coal-Electricity Group Co., Ltd. engages in mining, processing, washing, and sale of coal in China. It offers lean coal, 1/3 coking coal, gas fat coal, anthracite coal, and coking coal, which are used in electric power, metallurgy, petrochemical, building materials, coking, blast furnace injection, civil use, etc. The company is based in Huaibei City, China.
